articles.title: Guardrails for MFIs need to continue

The microfinance sector continues to demonstrate its resilience amid market fluctuations.

articles.title: MFs gain during market pain: Net flows zip 56% in march

Their increased investments played a crucial role in balancing out the recent foreign fund exits. Moreover, contributions via Systematic Investment Plans (SIPs) surged to unprecedented figures.

articles.title: D-Street goes green after streak of red

This surge not only elevated the market capitalizations of various companies but also attracted foreign portfolio investors as they shifted to net buyers.

articles.description: In a virtual call with GCC secretary general Jasem Mohamed Al Budaiwi, Goyal expressed hope that the ceasefire would pave way for lasting peace and stability.

articles.title: I am enduring pain fighting the party I built brick by brick, says PMK founder
articles.description: S. Ramadoss says he is not opposing the ‘Mango’ symbol, and contends that it is his symbol and was created by him. Describing the court verdict on the party dispute as ‘different’, he says the  Anbumani faction is making it seem as if the ‘Mango’ symbol and the party did not belong to him

articles.title: Guardrails for MFIs need to continue
articles.description: In a recent advisory, Sa-Dhan, a key player in the microfinance arena, underscores the necessity of upholding lending standards for financially vulnerable populations. These standards not only mitigate the risk of over-borrowing but also enhance trust within the financial ecosystem. The microfinance sector continues to demonstrate its resilience amid market fluctuations.

articles.title: Political slugfest between Congress-BJP in Haryana over crop procurement
articles.description: Farmers, who sustain the nation through their hard work, are being treated like criminals in the grain markets. It is as if they have arrived carrying illicit goods rather than their harvested crops,” Bhupinder Singh Hooda said

articles.title: Meet broad-based rules while serving AIFs, Sebi clarifies
articles.description: In a push to tighten regulations, Sebi has laid down fresh guidelines for asset management companies overseeing alternative investment funds. Each scheme is now required to include at least 20 investors, ensuring that no individual investor exceeds a 25% stake in the fund's total corpus.

dailyNews.description: The lost mines have prevented Iran from quickly complying with President Trump’s demand to allow more ships to pass through the waterway.

dailyNews.description: Washington has been debating the thrust of Mr. Trump’s foreign policy for more than a decade, with the only consensus being that “America First” means whatever the president says it does.

dailyNews.title: Officials Release Design for 250-Foot Arch in Washington, as Trump Seeks Another Imprint
dailyNews.description: The president has proposed the arch, which would rise on a Washington roundabout across from the Lincoln Memorial, as a way to celebrate America’s 250th anniversary.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says First Lady ‘Had a Right’ to Talk About Epstein
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in an interview that he had known his wife wanted to address rumors about the late sex offender at some point, but that he had not known exactly what she would say.

dailyNews.description: At a convention in New York, several Democrats mulling presidential bids rallied around opposition to President Trump’s decision to attack Iran.

dailyNews.title: Burned Before, Democrats Abruptly Revive the Idea of Impeaching Trump
dailyNews.description: Democrats in Congress have assiduously avoided talk of a third impeachment of President Trump, concerned that it would distract from their midterm campaign message. That tide seems to have turned.

dailyNews.title: Trump Moves Top Aide James Blair to Political Operation Ahead of Midterms
dailyNews.description: Mr. Blair will “lead the charge from the outside,” the president said on social media. The move comes as Republicans are bracing for a potentially difficult November election.

dailyNews.description: Without Trump on the midterms ballot, how will his party fare?
